revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 春日神社（合祀）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Co-Enshrinement of Katakishino Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|36.206842|136.143334}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Kasuga no Kami|lt=Kasuga no Kami|fr|Kasuga no Kami|ja|春日神|simple|Kasuga-no-Kami|zh|春日神|qid=Q11088805|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Co-Enshrinement of Katakishino Shrine'''|春日神社（合祀）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|gōshi|lt=gōshi|ja|合祀|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}
* {{ill|Q125316983|ltq=Q125316983|qid=Q125316983|1=Kasuga shrine (worship)}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11636413|ltq=Q11636413|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 94
** P155: {{ill|Konosumino Shrine|lt=Konosumino Shrine|qid=Q135040234|1=Konosumino Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040236|ltq=Q135040236|qid=Q135040236|1=Ohomisono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1047144|ltq=Q1047144|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}}
* {{ill|Sakai District, Fukui|lt=Sakai district|en|Sakai District, Fukui|ja|坂井郡|zh|坂井郡|qid=Q7402764|1=Sakai District, Fukui}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|36.206842|136.143334}}

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Kasuga no Kami|lt=Kasuga no Kami|fr|Kasuga no Kami|ja|春日神|simple|Kasuga-no-Kami|zh|春日神|qid=Q11088805|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182281
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
